channel.title: Defense Technology on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Defense Technology on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Ethan Thornton Revolution
item.description:
Introduction to Ethan Thornton and Mach Industries  

Ethan Thornton, a 19-year-old dropout from MIT, has been making waves in the defense technology industry with his company, Mach Industries. With a valuation of $1.8 billion and a recent $300 million Series C funding round, Mach Industries is taking the world of defense technology by storm. But what drives this young entrepreneur, and what are the implications of his company’s aggressive approach to innovation?
